name: Battle Mage
flavor: Magestone (Mage Knight) — hurls raw mana into the enemy ranks. Reskin of the Grenadier; the Fireball die behaves like the Grenade die. figureCandidates from Mage Knight: Resurrection (minisgallery.com) — casters; role assignment editorial.

specialAction.name: Fireball
specialAction.summary: Place a green Move token by the figurine, set the Fireball die on it, and flick it toward your foes (it must roll). All Units, friend or foe, within yellow range of the die suffer an attack of the rolled value (3, 5 or 7). On a backfire it explodes on the caster: only the Battle Mage is hit for 7. No valid target needed.

effects.text: A Fireball does not require a valid target.
A backfire hits only the Battle Mage for 7.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, choose an additional valid target and apply this Attack's hits to it as well.

figureCandidates.name: Bonebreaker Shaman
figureCandidates.roleFit: The set's common spellcaster — best Battle Mage stand-in.

figureCandidates.name: Solonavi Domineer
figureCandidates.roleFit: A Solonavi caster (the faction of powerful mages).

figureCandidates.name: Exarch Balion
figureCandidates.roleFit: An exarch/caster-leader, for a marquee mage.
